t_ch: 大家太熟了，认真不起来。
t_en: We're too familiar with each other. It's hard to get serious.

t_ch: 你当大家今天是来闹着玩呢？
t_en: You reckon we're all here just to play around today?

t_ch: 你是朱明仙舟的？
t_en: Are you from the Xianzhou Zhuming?

t_ch: 啊，没错，你去过？
t_en: Ah. Yes! Have you been there?

t_ch: 朱明的水土养人啊…
t_en: Zhuming's got a climate that makes people healthy...

t_ch: 还想再去一次。
t_en: I want to go there one more time.

t_ch: 等你休假来找我呗？
t_en: Wanna come find me when you're on vacation?

t_ch: 等这一战结束之后吧！
t_en: After this fight is over, then!

t_ch: 听说来到竞锋舰上的…
t_en: I heard that everyone who came aboard the Skysplitter...

t_ch: 全是精锐中的精锐！
t_en: ...Are cream of the crop!

t_ch: 难道说，我也是精锐？
t_en: Could I be an elite as well?

t_ch: 不然呢，肯定也是啊。
t_en: Well, what else would I be? I'm definitely one.

t_ch: 啊！妈妈，我出息了。
t_en: Ahhh! Mom, I'm winning at life!

t_ch: 没想到周围的人全是…
t_en: I didn't think that everyone around here would be...

t_ch: 全是什么？
t_en: Would be what?

t_ch: 会真正隐藏实力的人！
t_en: Would be people who hide their strength!

t_ch: 欢迎来到强者的世界。
t_en: Welcome to the world of the strong.

t_ch: 三月七是谁？
t_en: Who's March 7th?

t_ch: 别问我，我也不认识啊！
t_en: Don't ask me. I don't know either!

t_ch: 星槎海的战场打扫完毕了。
t_en: We have cleared out the enemies in Starskiff Haven.

t_ch: 但长乐天和金人巷似乎还陷入苦战中，我这就准备星槎——
t_en: But it seems that there are fierce battles being waged at both the Exalting Sanctum and Aurum Alley. I will prepare a starskiff—

t_ch: 久战不利，眼下必须争分夺秒地挫败呼雷制造的闹剧。
t_en: We cannot allow the fighting to continue. This is now a race against time to stop this farce that Hoolay has created.

t_ch: 虽然椒丘总是希望我适可而止、别动真格，但现在…该是真正「速战速决」的时候了。
t_en: I know Jiaoqiu always wants me to know my limits and not get carried away, but... now is the time to bring this to a swift end.

t_ch: 呼叫长乐天，如果看到空中有光，立刻全员散开！
t_en: Contact the Exalting Sanctum. Tell them, if they see a light in the sky, all units are to retreat immediately!

t_ch: 与此同时，金人巷中\n\n飞霄自天降下的风之箭矢精准地将步离人尽数击倒——
t_en: At the same time, in the Aurum Alley\n\nFeixiao's skyborne wind arrows accurately find their mark in the borisin...

t_ch: 啧，真是难搞啊。我就知道事情会变成这样……
t_en: Tsk, what a mess. I just knew it would end up this way...

t_ch: 这家伙每次上战场总喜欢搞出这么大的场面。
t_en: Every time she hits the battlefield she makes a mess like this.

t_ch: 这下连半个能问出情报的活口都不剩了。这些家伙里一定有人知道呼雷和椒丘的下落……
t_en: She didn't even leave a single survivor to get intel from. One of these men must have known about Hoolay and Jiaoqiu's whereabouts.

t_ch: 刚才那是怎么回事？
t_en: What happened just now?

t_ch: 是飞霄射出的「箭」，天知道这一回她是拿什么东西当作箭矢射到了这儿。
t_en: That was one of Feixiao's "arrows." Who knows what she used as an arrow to fire all the way over here.

t_ch: 如果她不提前喊一声，咱们几个怕是要跟这群狼崽子一起陪葬了。
t_en: If she hadn't given us a heads-up, we'd have all been wiped out with these little runts.

t_ch: 下次要是她出现，记得离她远远的。你应该也不希望自己变成一块一块的回列车吧？
t_en: Next time she appears in battle, make sure you keep your distance. You don't want to return to the Express in pieces, I'm sure?

t_ch: 你家将军未免太离谱了吧！
t_en: That general of yours is way out of line!

t_ch: 她…热血上头就是这样，把所有地方当成可以乱来的战场。
t_en: She... She's just very passionate. She sees every place as a battlefield where she can unleash hell.

t_ch: 你家将军一直是这样吗？
t_en: Has that general of yours always been like this?

t_ch: 谈不上「一直」，只是「经常」罢了。一旦打到兴头上，她就会把所有地方当成可以乱来的战场。
t_en: I wouldn't say "always"... But "often" would be fair. As soon as the heat of battle gets to her, she sees every place as a battlefield where she can unleash hell.

t_ch: 我想亲眼看她再射一箭…
t_en: I want to see her fire another arrow with my own eyes...

t_ch: 貊泽用冷漠的表情上下打量着你。你能读懂那没有任何表情的表情似乎在说「珍惜生命不好吗？」。
t_en: Moze sizes you up with a cold, indifferent gaze. You can almost hear the unspoken words in his expressionless face: "Is it not better to cherish your life instead?"

t_ch: 椒丘还活着吗…
t_en: Is Jiaoqiu still alive...?

t_ch: …椒丘必须活着。
t_en: ...He has to be.

t_ch: 像我这样的侍卫，不过是将军身旁一个微不足道的影子。但椒丘不同，若没有他的悉心治疗，便不会有今日的将军。
t_en: A retainer like myself is nothing more than an insignificant shadow who stands by the general's side. But Jiaoqiu is different. Without his careful treatment, the general wouldn't even be here today.

t_ch: 我从没这么希望他能靠自己的嘴皮子再拖延些时间……
t_en: Hopefully, he can use that silver tongue of his to buy himself enough time...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，四下看看，如果能找到一两个还活着的步离人就告诉我。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, take a good look around. If you can find one or two borisin that aren't dead yet, let me know.

t_ch: 不管他们嘴有多硬，我都有办法撬开，让他们吐露些情报出来。
t_en: I don't care how tight their lips are sealed. I always have a way to crack them open and get the information we need.

t_ch: 狼首人身的怪物仰面朝天，身上布满了悚人的刀伤。
t_en: The wolf-head monster was facing the sky, its body covered in terrifying knife wounds.

t_ch: 戳一戳。
t_en: Poke...

t_ch: 步离人毫无反应。
t_en: There are no responses whatsoever from the borisin.

t_ch: 离开尸体。
t_en: Leave the body.

t_ch: …好可怕的一击。
t_en: ...What a terrifying attack.

t_ch: 谁能想到…如此惊人的力量竟然掌握在一个狐人战奴的手里。
t_en: Who could have imagined... that such astonishing strength would lie in the hands of a foxian war slave...

t_ch: 如此果断，又如此…残暴。比起如今沦落到这般地步的我们，她才更像是都蓝的子裔。难怪战首会对她感兴趣。
t_en: So decisive, so... brutal. She is more like a descendant of Duran than we who have fallen to our current state. No wonder the Warhead has his eyes on her.

t_ch: 这家伙是…
t_en: That's...

t_ch: 那个闯入幽囚狱的劫犯。末度…你还真是一只无论如何都摁不死的臭虫啊。
t_en: The sneak that infiltrated The Shackling Prison. Mok Tok... You are harder to kill than a cockroach.

t_ch: 受了那样一击，竟然还活着…
t_en: The fact that you still draw breath after an attack like that...

t_ch: 我记得你，末度…你还真是一只无论如何都摁不死的臭虫啊。
t_en: I remember you, Mok Tok... You are harder to kill than a cockroach.

t_ch: 你能主动现身，也省去了我们一番功夫。
t_en: But, the fact that you have willingly shown yourself saves us some time.

t_ch: 现在投降还不算晚。告诉我，呼雷…还有，椒丘去了哪儿？
t_en: It is not too late for you to surrender. Tell me... where are Hoolay and Jiaoqiu?

t_ch: 省省力气吧，曜青的猴子。所有的野兽都明白一个道理，为了摆脱陷阱，就算扯断臂膀也在所不惜。今天，我将成为这只臂膀。
t_en: Save your energy, Yaoqing monkey. If there is one principle that we beasts know well, it is that we might have to break off an arm to break free from a cage. Today, I will be that arm.

t_ch: 在我漫长的狩猎生涯中，虽然只有眼前这短短的片刻追随了战首。但他的存在却像青丘的月亮般照亮了我们盲目已久的双眼，让我看见了道路。
t_en: I lived as a hunter for many years, yet I have only followed the Warhead for this recent, brief period. However, his existence has brought light back to our once-blind eyes, like the moon of Verdantia. He has shown me the way.

t_ch: 都蓝子裔背弃了「狼之古训」。为了苟延生命，我们在黑暗中东躲西藏，互相啃噬；我们不再是狼，反而变得像老鼠般龌龊、可悲。
t_en: The descendants of Duran have abandoned the Wolf's Creed. In order to ensure our survival, we took solace in the shadows and fed on one another. We were no longer wolves. We were no more than rats, living a dirty and pathetic life.

t_ch: 得蒙呼雷大人的恩赐，我分享了他的眼界与狼血——都蓝的子裔，应当为狼群的胜利而生，也要为狼群的胜利而死！
t_en: Thanks to the gift granted to us by Lord Hoolay, I have shared his vision and his blood... The descendants of Duran should live for the victory of the pack, and they should die for it as well!

t_ch: 来啊，曜青人，亮出你的爪牙！我和你，不死不休！
t_en: Come, Yaoqing man. Show me your fangs! We will fight to the death!

t_ch: 狗东西，还挺有荣誉感。
t_en: How honorable, you mangy dog.

t_ch: 但你会错意了，在这里没有什么一对一的公平决斗。等我们俩放倒了你，希望你还能一如既往地嘴硬。
t_en: But you seem to have misunderstood. There will be no fair one-on-one duel. Let's see how tough you are once we've put you down.

t_ch: 无论牺牲得有多壮烈…步离人，你们的战斗和死亡都没有一丝荣誉可言。
t_en: No matter how heroic your sacrifice... there is no honor in your battles or deaths, borisin.

t_ch: 看来，末度得偿所愿了。
t_en: It seems that Mok Tok got what he wished for.

t_ch: 呼雷…你的「宣战」计划完蛋了。
t_en: Hoolay... your "declaration of war" is over.

t_ch: 接下来，不管你逃到何处，飞霄将军都会逮到你，送你步上末度的后尘。
t_en: From now on, no matter where you run, General Feixiao will catch you and send you to the same fate as Mok Tok...

t_ch: 你的嘴皮子可比爪子锋利多了。
t_en: Your tongue is sharper than your claws.

t_ch: 别碍事，小子，让你的将军来和我说话，我和她的狩猎游戏还没结束呢。
t_en: Don't stand in my way, child. Have your general speak with me. Our little hunting game is not over yet.

t_ch: 退下吧，貊泽。我就在这儿，呼雷，你还有什么想说的？
t_en: Stand down, Moze. I am here, Hoolay. What do you wish to say?

t_ch: 天击将军，虽然咱们从未在战场上谋面。但这一路走来，我从属下和你的医士口中听到了不少关于你的有趣传闻。
t_en: The Merlin's Claw, though we have never met on the battlefield, I have heard many interesting things about you from both my men and your healer.

t_ch: 仙舟人真够胆，竟然放任一个流着步离之血的狐人战奴攀上将军的宝座。
t_en: The people of the Xianzhou must be quite brave to allow a foxian war slave with borisin blood to ascend to the position of general.

t_ch: 难道就没有人质疑过你的血统吗？还是因为你显赫的功绩让所有人暂时闭上了嘴？
t_en: Has no one ever questioned that lineage of yours? Or could it be that your grand achievements were enough to convince everyone to keep their lips sealed?

t_ch: 在战场上和自己的敌人攀亲道故，算得上是一种委婉的求饶…呼雷，你是在向我求饶吗？
t_en: Claiming to have family ties with the enemy sounds to me like an attempt at asking for mercy... Hoolay, are you begging me for mercy?

t_ch: 看来，你的血里不仅有狼的残忍，还兼具了狐的狡诈。
t_en: I see that it is not only the ruthless blood of a wolf that courses through your veins, but also the cunning blood of a fox.

t_ch: 说到底，这是来自步离人的馈赠。我们赠予的，我们也当有权收回——
t_en: When you think about it, this was a gift from the borisin. Anything that we gift, we are also free to reclaim...

t_ch: 天击将军，我向你发出最后的邀请：我会在竞锋舰上等候你的到来。
t_en: The Merlin's Claw, I shall extend a final invitation to you: I will be waiting for you on the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 在你到来之前，我将大开杀戒，让这七百年来黯淡已久的「赤月」再度跳动点燃，用血光照亮这艘众人瞩目的船，让世人认清仙舟有多么软弱无能。
t_en: Before you arrive, I will slaughter all in sight, allowing the Crimson Moon that has fallen dim for over seven hundred years to once more come to life. I will illuminate this ship with the sheen of blood and show everyone just how weak and powerless the Xianzhou is.

t_ch: 然后我会驾驭这艘舰船，冲破一切封锁和阻拦，踏上归乡的道路，让它成为步离人再兴的旗舰。
t_en: Then, I will pilot this ship through every blockade and barrier you have prepared and begin my journey home. This ship shall be the flagship for the borisin resurgence!

t_ch: 在我完成这一切之前，你有机会阻止我，或是死在我的手中，这将是我为你准备的道路。
t_en: Before I finish these tasks of mine, you have a chance to stop me, or die at my hands. This is the path that I have prepared for you.

t_ch: 我接受你的挑战，呼雷。因为从踏上竞锋舰的这一刻起，你已经走上了一条绝路。
t_en: I accept your challenge, Hoolay. Because the very moment you stepped aboard the Skysplitter, you stepped onto your path to ruin.

t_ch: 你来了啊，飞霄！
t_en: There you are, Feixiao!

t_ch: 驭空姐姐，时隔三十年，咱们又再次并肩战斗了。
t_en: Madam Yukong! After thirty years, we find ourselves fighting side-by-side once more!

t_ch: 好久没松松筋骨了，开始吧！
t_en: It's been a while since I've let loose. Let's get this started!

t_ch: 眼下是在罗浮仙舟上，你可给我收着点拳脚！
t_en: Remember you are still on the Luofu. Try not to go too wild!

t_ch: 杀了她，杀光这些狐人——
t_en: Kill her! Kill all these foxians—

t_ch: 还没认清现实吗？从现身这一刻起，你们只有死路一条。
t_en: Have you still not realized your situation? From the moment you appeared, you were doomed to one fate.

t_ch: 别再藏头露尾了！呼雷，出来面对我！
t_en: Enough hiding, Hoolay! Come out and face me!

t_ch: 等仙舟人流够了血，战首会现身的！
t_en: The Warhead will appear once enough Xianzhou blood has been spilled!

t_ch: 很遗憾，他看不到这一幕了。
t_en: What a shame he will never get to see that.

t_ch: 长乐天那边的情况如何？
t_en: How are things at the Exalting Sanctum?

t_ch: 步离人…他们越来越多了！
t_en: The borisin... They keep coming!

t_ch: 尽力压制住他们，缩小包围圈！
t_en: Do all you can to suppress them and fence them in!

t_ch: 再坚持片刻，我的支援马上就到！
t_en: Hang in there a bit longer, reinforcements are on the way!

t_ch: 战首的血…在我体内沸腾…
t_en: The Warhead's blood... It boils in my veins...

t_ch: 呼雷万岁！步离人的复兴必将到来！
t_en: Long live Hoolay! The borisin resurgence is at hand!

t_ch: 「步离人的复兴」？
t_en: The borisin resurgence?

t_ch: 你们以为自己还能像千年前那样到处侵略和屠戮？
t_en: You think you can still pillage and murder freely as you did a thousand years before?

t_ch: 曜青仙舟将确保那只是你们死前最不切实际的幻想！
t_en: The Xianzhou Yaoqing will ensure that this is nothing more than your dying fantasy!

t_ch: 来啊，这点小伤！我绝不退却！
t_en: Fight me! You think a scrape like this will send me running!?

t_ch: 我必须…撑下去…
t_en: I must... hold on...

t_ch: 步离人的复兴…会来的…
t_en: The borisin resurgence... shall come...

t_ch: 演武仪典即将召开\n\n竞锋舰
t_en: The Wardance is about to commence\n\nSkysplitter

t_ch: 竞锋舰
t_en: Skysplitter

t_ch: 「我要托付你们的绝不只是擂台上的胜负荣辱，还有竞锋舰的安全。」
t_en: I'm entrusting you not only with the honor of the ring, but also with the security of the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 爷爷说的倒是轻松，尽给我出些难题。
t_en: That's easy for my grandfather to say, but this mission doesn't seem so simple anymore.

t_ch: 第一场擂赛马上就要开始了…不知彦卿那边是否一切顺利？
t_en: The first round of the tournament is about to begin... I wonder how Yanqing and the others are doing?

t_ch: 按照计划，我也该找竞锋舰上的云骑士兵问问，看看他们有什么发现。
t_en: According to the plan, I should seek out the Cloud Knight soldiers aboard the Skysplitter and see if they've discovered anything.

t_ch: 三月，是我，云璃。你还好吗？
t_en: March, it's me, Yunli. Are you okay?

t_ch: 呜哇啊啊啊啊——
t_en: Aghhhhhhhh...!

t_ch: 哎哟，疼疼疼疼，稍等一下，我马上过来。
t_en: Ooh, ow-ow-owww. Just a moment, I'm coming!

t_ch: 哎…慌慌张张的。
t_en: Ah... She's still a nervous wreck.

t_ch: 感觉你有点紧张了。
t_en: You still seem nervous.

t_ch: 原本我也没有这么紧张的，但一个人待在休息室里就会越想越多。毕竟这一次参加演武仪典，咱们的身上还背负着这么重的任务……
t_en: I wasn't this nervous before... It's just being alone in this lounge, I can't stop thinking about everything. I mean, not only are we taking part in the Wardance, but we have such an important mission to carry out as well...

t_ch: 三月，冷静一点。
t_en: March, calm down.

t_ch: 别担心你的任务，还有我帮你。
t_en: Don't worry about your mission. I am here to help you.

t_ch: 别担心你的任务。你不是还有我吗。别被爷爷「代表罗浮守擂」的出战名头给唬住了。
t_en: Don't worry about your mission. You have me here too, right? I know my grandfather said that you must "represent the Luofu as the ringmaster," but don't let that intimidate you.

t_ch: 问问你自己，你是星穹列车无名客，一向来去自由，但为什么在爷爷把任务交给我们后，你和我一起登上了这竞锋舰？
t_en: Ask yourself: You are a Nameless of the Astral Express. You have always been free to come and go as you please. So, why did you board the Skysplitter with me when my grandfather gave us this mission?

t_ch: 要说为什么的话…因为我也希望，演武仪典能顺利召开。
t_en: Why...? Because I also want the Wardance to go smoothly.

t_ch: 对无名客来说，虽然每一站我们都只是过客…可在这里我结识了两位师父，也认识了许多朋友。为了大家，我希望这场「演武仪典」能一切顺利。
t_en: For us Nameless, even though we're just visitors at every stop... It was here that I met my two masters and made many new friends. I want the Wardance to go ahead without any problems, for everyone's sake.

t_ch: 答的好！擂赛马上就要开始了，我必须去完成爷爷交付的任务了。
t_en: Good answer! The tournament is about to begin, so I must go carry out the mission that Grandpa gave me.

t_ch: 三月，祝你宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜。
t_en: March, may your blade be sharp and your victory glorious.

t_ch: …谢谢你，云璃师父。
t_en: ...Thank you, Master Yunli.

t_ch: 好不容易让她没有那么紧张了，现在就不去打扰她了。
t_en: It took enough time to calm her nerves, it's best I don't disturb her again now.

t_ch: 这不是云璃小姐吗？如果有什么事情需要帮助的，请告诉在下。
t_en: Is that you, Miss Yunli? If there is anything that I can help you with, please let me know.

t_ch: 云骑的布置情况怎么样了？
t_en: How are the Cloud Knights doing?

t_ch: 按照怀炎将军的指示，云骑已经各就其位。
t_en: The Cloud Knights are all in position, following General Huaiyan's orders.

t_ch: 你有发现有「狼」的情况吗？
t_en: Have you noticed any "wolves"?

t_ch: 眼下我们还没有注意到异常情况。
t_en: We haven't noticed anything out of the ordinary yet.

t_ch: 做得很好，不过我还得和你再次确认一下——
t_en: Very good. Although, there is one thing I want to confirm with you...

t_ch: 你们有识别步离人的手段吗？
t_en: Do you have a way of identifying borisin?

t_ch: 很遗憾，我们目前没有能区分步离人与狐人的手段。
t_en: Unfortunately, we don't have any means to distinguish between borisin and foxians.

t_ch: 不过可以肯定的是，关于伪造身份，云骑正在抓紧排查溯源……
t_en: However, you can rest assured that the Cloud Knights are working hard to investigate the source of the forged identities...

t_ch: 讲讲眼下云骑的部署规划？
t_en: Tell me about how the Cloud Knights are currently deployed.

t_ch: 竞锋舰上全体云骑各司其职，不敢怠慢。
t_en: All Cloud Knights on the Skysplitter have their own responsibilities and wouldn't dare neglect their posts.

t_ch: 我和三月七已经感受到了，来到竞锋舰上的云骑士兵们个个都是精锐。
t_en: March 7th and I could already tell. It's clear that every Cloud Knight soldier we've met on the Skysplitter is an elite warrior.

t_ch: 我想确认有无异常登舰的情况。
t_en: I would like to confirm if there have been any irregularities in boarding.

t_ch: 云璃小姐来得正是时候，就在刚才，我们收到了一个紧急登舰请求。
t_en: Your timing is perfect, Miss Yunli. We actually just received an emergency boarding request.

t_ch: 紧急登舰请求？
t_en: An emergency boarding request?

t_ch: 它不在抵达竞锋舰的星槎航班表上，不过星槎上本身通牒文件都是正式的。
t_en: It wasn't on the Skysplitter starskiff registry, but all the documentation checked out.

t_ch: 谁会在这个时候登舰？位置在哪，我去检查一下。
t_en: Who would be boarding the ship at this time? Where are they? I'll go check it out.

t_ch: 那艘星槎会从选手用的停船港登舰，需要在下为您带路吗？
t_en: The starskiff is using the contestant docking bay. Would you like me to lead the way?

t_ch: 不用了，你还有执勤的任务，我一个人去就行。
t_en: No need. You have your own duties to take care of. I'll be fine by myself.

t_ch: 例行检查！请登舰乘客立刻接受检查。
t_en: Routine inspection! All passengers please prepare for an inspection.

t_ch: （这就是可疑的星槎？乘船的人呢……）
t_en: (So, this is the suspicious starskiff? Where did the passengers go...?)

t_ch: 我数十个数，再不出来，我就把船砸了哦？
t_en: I'm going to count down from ten. If you do not come out, I will destroy the ship.

t_ch: 十！
t_en: Ten!

t_ch: 九、八、七、六、五、四…时间要到了哦！
t_en: Nine, eight, seven, six, five, four... Time is running out!

t_ch: 三！二！
t_en: Three! Two!

t_ch: 一！
t_en: One!

t_ch: 等等！
t_en: Wait a second!

t_ch: 是我。
t_en: It's me.

t_ch: 例行检查而已，你不会真的要把船砸了吧？难道这也是你们朱明传统……
t_en: It's just a routine inspection. You weren't actually going to blow up the ship, were you? Is that also some kind of Zhuming custom...?

t_ch: 你怎么回来了！？
t_en: What are you doing back here!?

t_ch: 该不会是步离人伪装的吧？
t_en: You're not a borisin in disguise, are you?

t_ch: 等等，就算步离人变形伪装，也变不了我这样的小个子吧！快把剑收起来。
t_en: Wait! Even though the borisin can disguise themselves, they can't turn into someone as short as me! Put your sword away.

t_ch: 咱们的彦卿小弟不是说要放弃守擂，选择猎狼，为将军分忧解难吗？
t_en: Didn't little Yanqing claim he was going to give up being the ringmaster and go on the hunt instead? Help shoulder the general's burdens?

t_ch: 地面上步离人突然展开了袭击，飞霄将军担心这是呼雷的障眼法，于是我就主动请命赶来驰援竞锋舰。
t_en: The borisin on the ground suddenly launched an attack. General Feixiao was concerned that this was all a diversion by Hoolay, so I requested to come to the Skysplitter and provide support.

t_ch: 没想到你兜兜转转，又回到了竞锋舰上，不过此刻擂台你是上不了啦。
t_en: I can't believe you ended up back here on the Skysplitter after running around all over the place. But, you're too late to enter the tournament now.

t_ch: 按照爷爷的安排，咱们俩的好徒弟三月会代替你登台守擂——是不是感到很骄傲啊？
t_en: Following Grandpa's plan, our disciple March is taking your place as ringmaster... Aren't you proud of her?

t_ch: 乍一听到这么有冲击性的事实，还真是又自豪，又让人担心来着。
t_en: When I first heard the news, I was definitely proud, but also a little concerned...

t_ch: 多一个人手总是好事，竞锋舰这么大，对了，你应该知道——
t_en: More manpower is always a good thing, since the Skysplitter is so large. Oh, and by the way, you should know that—

t_ch: 怎么回事？！
t_en: What's happening!?

t_ch: 竞锋舰的速度似乎在变慢？莫非……
t_en: Does it feel like the Skysplitter has slowed down? Could it be...

t_ch: 跟我走，咱们去引擎室瞧瞧！作为整艘舰船的核心设施，我们优先确保那儿的安全！
t_en: Come with me, we need to check the engine room! It's the heart of the ship, so we need to prioritize its safety!

t_ch: 古怪，这附近怎么一个人都不见了？
t_en: Strange, why is there no one here?

t_ch: 云骑…都在这里。
t_en: The Cloud Knights... They're over here.

t_ch: 你们也应该和他们躺在一起……
t_en: And you should be lying alongside them...

t_ch: 放心吧小娃娃，这里的空间还很宽敞，有足够藏下你们尸体的地方。
t_en: Don't worry, children, there's plenty of space to hide your bodies over here.

t_ch: 虽说打心眼里希望这场「演武仪典」能一切平安无事，让我虚惊一场……
t_en: Even though I truly hoped that the Wardance would go ahead uninterrupted and that I was worrying for no reason...

t_ch: 但这帮家伙终于还是来了啊，我心尖上压着的这块石头总算也能落地了！来吧，孽物！
t_en: Now that these guys have finally shown up, it's a huge weight off my mind. Bring it on, you abominations!

t_ch: 引擎舱里发现了两只狼，就意味着其他的地方会有更多孽物潜入…呼雷已经登上了竞锋舰！
t_en: If we found two wolves in the engine room, that means that even more abominations have infiltrated other areas... Hoolay is already aboard the Skysplitter!

t_ch: 没时间解释了，「演武仪典」应该已经开始了！如果我猜的没错，在步离人登舰之后，他们极有可能在仪典上大肆杀戮。
t_en: There's no time to talk about this. The Wardance has already started! If my guess is correct, the borisin will most likely use the ceremony to begin their slaughter.

t_ch: 走吧，我们现在就赶往演武仪典的擂台！
t_en: Let's go. We need to get to the Wardance ring!

t_ch: 尊敬的各位来宾，各位选手，欢迎各位莅临罗浮仙舟星天演武仪典！
t_en: We would like to welcome all of our honored guests and contestants... to the Xianzhou Luofu's Luminary Wardance ceremony!

t_ch: 在进入第一场擂赛前，赛事组委会隆重向各位介绍银河著名主持人——叽米先生，作为嘉宾主持来到现场！
t_en: Before we get the first round under way, our organizing committee would like to introduce you all to a host known throughout the cosmos — Mr. Owlbert! He is here today as our special guest host!

t_ch: *欢呼的声音*
t_en: *cheering*

t_ch: 有请嘉宾主持叽米先生，为演武仪典正式揭幕——
t_en: Let us invite our special guest host, Mr. Owlbert, to the stage to formally open the Wardance—

t_ch: 演武仪典到此为止了！
t_en: Your Wardance ends here!

t_ch: 从此刻开始，竞锋舰将属于我。各位观众，我将为你们带来一场货真价实的死斗！
t_en: From this moment on, the Skysplitter belongs to me. And for you, dear spectators, I have prepared a true fight to the death!

t_ch: 现在，尽情逃跑吧！
t_en: Now, run for your lives!

t_ch: 抱歉，这艘船上并没有你期待的观众——这儿的所有人，全都为你而来。
t_en: My apologies! The spectators that you were expecting aren't here... Everyone here actually came to see you.

t_ch: 云骑，备战！
t_en: Cloud Knights, prepare for battle!

t_ch: 仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！
t_en: Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars!...

t_ch: 看来你们早有准备了。
t_en: I see you were ready for me.

t_ch: *呼应战首的狼啸声*
t_en: *echoing the howl of the Warhead*

t_ch: 那样也好！既然做好了送死的准备，来吧，尽你们所能——让我尽兴吧！
t_en: That's fine too! Since you have all prepared for your deaths, come, give me all you've got — entertain me!

t_ch: 「演武仪典」召开前三个时辰\n\n神策府
t_en: Three dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nSeat of Divine Foresight.

t_ch: 「围三阙一」…这就是你所说的，能确保演武仪典如常进行的计划吗？
t_en: Surround your enemy, but leave one side open... This is your strategy for ensuring that the Wardance will be able to be held as usual?

t_ch: 正是。呼雷出逃，本该立刻终止演武仪典的举行。谁也不能预料这头凶兽会袭向哪里，似仪典这样的节庆，反而更容易成为他逞凶的目标。
t_en: Precisely. When Hoolay escaped, we should have canceled the Wardance immediately. No one can predict where a wild beast like him will attack, yet festivals and celebrations like this are likely to become targets.

t_ch: 不过，演武仪典筹备良久，势在必行，宣布中断又让我心疼得很。我转念一想，既然不得不开，那还是开吧。只是今日召开的又何必是真正的演武仪典呢？
t_en: However, preparations for the Wardance were in the works for so long, I couldn't bear to announce its cancellation. So, I thought, if the show must go on, then let it go on. But that doesn't mean that the Wardance we hold today has to be the real event.

t_ch: 只要将登舰观众与选手全数替换成云骑士兵，高悬在空中的那座竞锋舰，将会成为绝佳的猎狼战场。
t_en: All we need to do is swap all the spectators and contestants aboard the ship with Cloud Knight soldiers, and the Skysplitter, soaring high above, will become the ultimate battleground for our hunt.

t_ch: …可要是呼雷没有打算袭击演武仪典，又该怎么办呢？
t_en: ...But what do we do if Hoolay is not planning to attack the Wardance?

t_ch: 那就尽可能让他看见竞锋舰。天舶司会清空航道，减少其他星槎通航。这样一来，当天上只剩下一艘船时，他便有了不得不去的理由。
t_en: Then we just need to draw his attention to the Skysplitter. We'll have the Sky-Faring Commission clear all transport lanes and cut down starskiff traffic. Then, when the time comes, there will be only one ship in the sky, and he will have no reason not to attack.

t_ch: 而飞霄将军会负责敲山震狼，切断步离人逃亡的路线，让他自以为找到了去处。
t_en: General Feixiao will be in charge of scaring the wolves and cutting off their other means of escape, making him think that this will be his best way out.

t_ch: 考虑到步离人在罗浮上有内应，我会负责前去施加压力，令内应们疲于自保。
t_en: Given that the borisin already have insiders on the Luofu, I will be in charge of putting pressure on them, making them focus solely on keeping themselves safe.

t_ch: 好啊！那么老朽也该动动身子骨了。我会与天舶司一同紧守玉界门，以防局势失控。
t_en: Very good! Then I'd better dust off my weary bones, too! I will go with the Sky-Faring Commission to guard the Jade Gate and ensure that things do not spiral out of control.

t_ch: 能有炎老担当这最后的保险，晚辈就放心了。
t_en: Knowing that Elder Huaiyan is part of our last line of defense is a great comfort.

t_ch: 这场狩猎务必教呼雷明白，「巡猎」的锋镝，永远快孽物一步。
t_en: This hunt will make Hoolay understand that the arrows of The Hunt will always be one step ahead of the abominations.

t_ch: 刚才的震动…到底是什么情况？似乎整座舰船渐渐慢了下来？
t_en: That jolt just now... what's going on? It feels like the entire ship has started to slow down?

t_ch: 应该是步离人真的入侵了竞锋舰。按照怀炎将军的指示…我也该行动起来了。
t_en: Borisin must have actually infiltrated the Skysplitter. Based on General Huaiyan's orders... it's time for me to take action.

t_ch: （低吼）！
t_en: *roaring*!

t_ch: 你们…肯定不是负责扮演步离人的云骑军吧？
t_en: You guys... you're not Cloud Knights acting as borisin, are you?

t_ch: 你们…是真正的步离人吧？！
t_en: You're... you're real borisin, aren't you?

t_ch: （低吼）！
t_en: *roaring*!

t_ch: …彦卿师父，你怎么回来了？
t_en: ...Master Yanqing, what are you doing here?

t_ch: 当然是因为心系竞锋舰和弟子的安危啊。
t_en: I was concerned about the safety of the Skysplitter and my dear disciple, of course!

t_ch: 彦卿小弟，你想要猎的狼，此刻正站在咱们头顶上演武仪典的擂台里，挑战云骑……
t_en: Yanqing, the wolf you are hunting is standing above us in the Wardance ring at this very moment, facing the Cloud Knights...

t_ch: 这场「演武仪典」的实况不会出现在仙舟人们的眼中，它也不是什么点到为止的剑斗。这是一场没有荣誉，只有凶险的死斗。三月，你准备好了吗？
t_en: This "Wardance" will not be seen by the people of the Xianzhou, nor will it be just a ceremonial sword fight. This is a battle to the death that offers no honor, only mortal danger. March, are you ready?

t_ch: 我可是三月七。
t_en: I am March 7th.

t_ch: 拜托，我可是代表罗浮出战的剑士，三月七！
t_en: Please, I am March 7th, a swordmaster who will represent the Luofu in glorious battle!

t_ch: 我可是两位的弟子。
t_en: I am your disciple.

t_ch: 做师父的上阵，怎么能少得了我这个弟子呢！
t_en: If my masters are going to battle, how could they go without their disciple?

t_ch: 唉，来都来了！
t_en: Well, since I'm already here!

t_ch: 还得引用景元将军的名言吧，「嗐，来都来了。」
t_en: To use General Jing Yuan's favorite expression: "Since I'm already here..."

t_ch: 云璃，三月小姐，祝两位宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
t_en: Yunli, Miss March, may your blades be sharp and your victories glorious!

t_ch: 也祝你们宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
t_en: May your blades be sharp and your victories glorious!

t_ch: 咱也一样，祝你们…算了，还是祝大家旗开得胜吧！
t_en: May your blades... Ah forget it. Let's go and make this a quick victory!

t_ch: 走吧！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 演武仪典「猎狼守擂」 开始
t_en: The Wardance "Wolfhunt Showdown" starts now!

t_ch: 不久之前…
t_en: Not long ago...

t_ch: 对于狩猎而言，秘密是不可或缺的武器。没有秘密的人，只是被撕开皮肉，悲惨等死的猎物。
t_en: Secrets are a weapon that a hunter cannot live without. Those that have no secrets are no more than prey, cut open and waiting for death.

t_ch: 这么说来，在你眼中，我已经是一头毫无秘密可言、随时待死的猎物了？
t_en: What you're saying is, in your eyes, I am no more than prey that has exhausted all of its secrets and is simply awaiting its death?

t_ch: 难道你还有其他的路可逃么？椒丘，我已将你的伪装和防御层层撕开，你和你所侍奉的将军，你们深藏的秘密，我已了如指掌。
t_en: Do you think you have some other escape route? Jiaoqiu, I have already peeled back your disguises and defenses layer by layer. I know all the secrets that you and your general have buried so deep.

t_ch: 可是战首也将自己的秘密告诉了我，我已了如指掌。
t_en: But you have told me all of your secrets too, Warhead.

t_ch: 你永远也用不上它了。你会和它一同埋葬在这儿。不过，你始终是个幸运的家伙……
t_en: But you will never have a chance to use them. You will be buried with them right here. Although, you are a fortunate one...

t_ch: 毕竟你不用去活着见证你的将军所要面临的悲惨未来。
t_en: After all, you will avoid having to see the tragic future that awaits your general.

t_ch: 我想她比你更明白自己的结局——终有一日，她将在战斗中被一次比一次更猛烈的「月狂」压倒，最终在变形和狂怒中四分五裂。
t_en: I'm sure she understands her fate far better than you ever will. One day on the battlefield, she will be overpowered by her ever-intensifying Moon Rage and finally be torn apart by her fury and transformation.

t_ch: 就连你们所{RUBY_B#「巡猎」的岚}信奉的神{RUBY_E#}也无法将她从这个结局中拯救出来…相反，祂倒是可以为她带去解脱。
t_en: Not even {RUBY_B#Lan, The Hunt}your God{RUBY_E#} can save her from this fate... Although, THEY can lead her to liberation.

t_ch: 而唯一的救治之道，在我手中。
t_en: And the only way to save her is here, in my hands.

t_ch: 到底你是医士我是医士啊？你就对自己的判断这么自信吗？
t_en: Are you the healer or am I!? Are you really that certain of your own judgment?

t_ch: 我该走了，狐人。在离去之前，你知道我要做什么，对吧？
t_en: I must leave, foxian. But before I go, you know what I must do, don't you?

t_ch: 「饮血酒」…听说步离人的战俗，是在上阵前杀俘饮血，激发狂性……
t_en: Drink bloodwine... I hear it is a borisin custom to kill prisoners and drink their blood before battle to stir up their madness.

t_ch: 你真是花了不少工夫研究我们…不过，你的路就到此为止了。
t_en: You really did put hard work into researching us... It is a shame that this is where your journey ends.

t_ch: 啊啊啊……
t_en: Ah...

t_ch: 你…就是椒丘医士？
t_en: Are you... the healer, Jiaoqiu?

t_ch: 找我有什么事吗？
t_en: Is there anything that I can do for you?

t_ch: 我听说那个时候是你救下了我？
t_en: I heard that you saved me?

t_ch: 不必客气。
t_en: There's no need to thank me.

t_ch: 你是医士的话，能治好我的「月狂」之症吗？
t_en: If you're a healer, can you cure my Moon Rage?

t_ch: 治好了又如何？看你再次登上战场去送死？听我一句劝，孩子，你的身体状况，不适合再上战场。
t_en: And what if I can? Do I just sit back and watch as you head back out to die in battle? Listen to me, child, your condition is not suited for the battlefield.

t_ch: 那么，你能「治好」战争吗？
t_en: Okay... Then can you "cure" war?

t_ch: 你说什么？我只是个医士！我能做的只有——
t_en: What are you talking about? I'm just a healer! All I can do is—

t_ch: 所以，你能做的便是治好我们，让我们去「医治」战争。
t_en: So, all you can do is heal us, and let us go "cure" war.

t_ch: 真是大言不惭啊，小姑娘。这场战争持续了几千年，还会继续打下去！说什么「医治」战争，你们不过是在送死！
t_en: Such arrogance, young lady! This war has been waged for thousands of years, and it will only continue! What do you mean by "cure" war? All you will achieve is getting yourself killed!

t_ch: 就像你们这些医士拼命救死扶伤，但这世上依旧会有疾病和死亡一样。我们也会一直战斗下去的。
t_en: You healers work yourselves to the bone to save people, even though there will always be sickness and death. So we will also keep fighting.

t_ch: 我不能代替那些已经不在的人发言。但我知道，月御将军…还有所有一去不回的战士们不是白白送死。
t_en: I cannot speak for the dead. But, I know that General Yueyu... as well as all the warriors that never returned from battle will not have died in vain!

t_ch: 他们是为了让更多的人活着回到故乡，就像你做的那样。
t_en: They fought so that others could make it home alive. Your actions are no different.

t_ch: 椒丘，我命令你！治好我！
t_en: Jiaoqiu, this is an order! Cure me!

t_ch: …没有秘密的人…只是被撕开皮肉，悲惨等死的猎物。
t_en: ...Those who have no secrets... are no more than prey... cut open and waiting for death...

t_ch: 尽情痛饮我的鲜血吧…呼雷。只可惜，我不是一个没有秘密的人啊。我还藏着一个微不足道的秘密……
t_en: Enjoy the taste of my fresh blood... Hoolay. Unfortunately, I am not a man without secrets. I still have one little secret hidden up my sleeve...

t_ch: 「颠踬散」…我早早喝下了它，药毒已流遍我的全身…迟早…会在你身上见效。
t_en: Tumbledust... I drank it a while ago, and the poison is already flowing through my veins... Sooner or later... you will begin to feel the effects.

t_ch: 世间至毒…若能换回无辜的生命，便也可被称作良药……
t_en: If the most lethal poison known to this world... is able to save innocent lives... Then it can also be called a great medicine...

t_ch: 「我将尽力医治」…飞霄，我兑现承诺了。用这条微不足道的性命……
t_en: I will do my best to cure you... Feixiao, I kept my promise. At the cost of this insignificant life...

t_ch: …为「曜青」带来胜利。
t_en: ...bring victory to the Yaoqing.

t_ch: 擂赛开始前，要不抽空跟三月见个面？
t_en: Maybe I should take a moment to meet with March before the tournament starts?

t_ch: 三月现在就待在选手休息室里，也不知道她准备得如何了……
t_en: March is in the contestant's lounge right now. I wonder how her preparations are coming along...

t_ch: 按照爷爷的安排，现在应该问问竞锋舰上的云骑士兵，有没有新的情况……
t_en: According to Grandpa's plan, I should seek out the Cloud Knight soldiers aboard the Skysplitter and see if there've been any new developments...

t_ch: （我得赶紧去确认一下。）
t_en: (I have to check on this immediately.)

t_ch: 演武仪典即将开始，请各位选手进入赛场就位。
t_en: The Wardance is about to begin. Contestants, please make your way to the arena.

t_ch: 引擎舱就在前边，走吧。
t_en: The engine room is just up ahead. Let's go.

t_ch: 跟我走！我带你去擂台。
t_en: Come with me! To the ring!

t_ch: 走这边，我们到的还不算晚！
t_en: This way, we're not too late!

t_ch: 尊敬的各位来宾，各位选手，欢迎各位莅临罗浮仙舟星天演武仪典！
t_en: We would like to welcome all of our honored guests and contestants... to the Xianzhou Luofu's Luminary Wardance ceremony!

t_ch: 将军的安排终于还是派上了用场…我必须尽快找到云璃他们。
t_en: It looks like the general's arrangements are finally coming in handy... I need to find Yunli and the others as soon as possible.

t_ch: 按照计划，一旦呼雷出现，云骑们会全员集合，尽可能制伏他。
t_en: The plan said that if Hoolay appears, the Cloud Knights will assemble and do everything they can to suppress him.

t_ch: 云璃师父你在哪儿？
t_en: Master Yunli, where are you?

t_ch: 三月，我正在擂台下方！
t_en: March, I'm below the ring!

t_ch: 擂台下面的大厅…我记得是在这边。
t_en: The hall below the ring... I remember it being this way...

t_ch: 久候你多时了，呼雷！
t_en: I've been waiting a long time for this, Hoolay!

t_ch: 竟然派几个幼崽来送死…
t_en: I see Feixiao has sent some young cubs to the slaughter...

t_ch: 给我记好了，我叫三月七！罗浮的守擂剑士！
t_en: Remember this! My name is March 7th! Ringmaster of the Luofu!

t_ch: 难道罗浮仙舟上没有其他够格的战士了吗？
t_en: Does the Xianzhou Luofu not have any worthy warriors?

t_ch: 那你可得留神，被幼崽打败的滋味，你这头老狼未必消化得了啊！
t_en: I wouldn't let my guard down if I were you. It's about time this old wolf tasted defeat at the hands of a young cub!

t_ch: 你们以为设下了埋伏，人多就能取胜？
t_en: You think a little ambush is enough to defeat me?

t_ch: 我会让你们明白，你们错得彻底！
t_en: I will make you understand just how wrong you are!

t_ch: 好惊人的力量——
t_en: Such insane power...

t_ch: 罢了，在飞霄到来之前，就由你们来充当余兴节目吧！
t_en: Fine. You can be a little opening act for me until Feixiao finally arrives!

t_ch: 小崽子们，尽全力挥剑吧！
t_en: Swing with all your might, dear cubs!

t_ch: 你们以为我会逃跑？狼所行之路，只有前进，没有逃离！
t_en: You thought I would run? A wolf's path only goes forward. Running is never an option!

t_ch: 不错！但还远远不够！
t_en: Not bad! But it will take much more than that!

t_ch: 我的身躯百杀不死，你们的刀剑弱如芒草！
t_en: Your feeble weapons are like blades of grass before my unbreakable body!

t_ch: 飞霄为什么还不来？这些小崽子实在无趣！
t_en: Why is Feixiao still not here? I grow bored of these cubs!

t_ch: 再这样下去，我可要杀光他们啦！
t_en: If this goes on, they'll all be dead by the time she arrives!

t_ch: 仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！
t_en: Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars!...

t_ch: 呼雷的动作变迟钝了？
t_en: Hoolay's movements are slowing down?

t_ch: 别放过眼前的机会！
t_en: This is our chance!

t_ch: 咱们一起，让他屁股向后，狗头着地！
t_en: It's time for us to put this dog down!

t_ch: 椒丘，你竟然…！
t_en: Jiaoqiu, you—!

t_ch: 一剂毒药罢了…以为靠这样的手段能扭转战局？
t_en: A pathetic little poison like this... You think this is enough to turn the tide of battle?

t_ch: 我确实变慢了…
t_en: I may be slowing down...

t_ch: 可这不代表你们能赢……
t_en: But that does not mean you can defeat me...

t_ch: 你确实很难杀死，但绝不代表你无法被制服！
t_en: You may be hard to kill, but that does not mean you cannot be overpowered!

t_ch: 呼雷！看仔细了，云骑天威，尽在此剑！
t_en: Hoolay! Take a good look. The power of the Cloud Knights is in my blade!

t_ch: 在将军们计谋运筹之下，接下来你们将要直面步离强敌了，理应做好准备再继续前进。
t_en: Under the careful planning and deliberation of the generals, you are about to face the powerful borisin enemies. You should make your preparations before advancing forward.

t_ch: 我已经准备好了。
t_en: I'm ready.

t_ch: 让我再喘口气。
t_en: Let me rest for a bit first.

t_ch: 如何让挑食的小孩吃下青椒？
t_en: How do we get a picky child to eat green chilis?

t_ch: 如何让多疑的恶狼服下毒药？
t_en: How do we get a suspicious and devious wolf to drink down poison?

t_ch: 答案，我早已告诉过你。
t_en: I've already told you the answer.

t_ch: 至此为止，「猎狼计划」终于顺利收场。
t_en: The "Wolf-Hunt Mission" has finally come to a smooth end.

t_ch: 随着战首败亡，狼卒们无力抵抗，被云骑军尽数镇压。{NICKNAME}与貊泽找到了奄奄一息的椒丘。
t_en: As the Warhead is defeated and slain, the Wolftroopers can no longer resist and are completely overwhelmed by the Cloud Knights. {NICKNAME} and Moze then find Jiaoqiu, who is at death's door.

t_ch: 而此时此刻，「呼雷越狱」一事，仍有最后一笔账等待清算……
t_en: And this time, there's one more business that must be settled with the affair around Hoolay's jailbreak...

t_ch: 亏你们几个能撑到现在。这场狩猎总算是圆满收场了，云骑军正在善后撤离中。
t_en: This hunt is finally over. Thank you for holding out so long. The Cloud Knights are withdrawing as we speak.

t_ch: 彦卿骁卫，你身体还撑得住吗？
t_en: Lieutenant Yanqing, how are you holding up?

t_ch: 我还能再打十个！
t_en: I could take on ten more!

t_ch: 我好得很…一点事都没有！就算再来十个呼雷……
t_en: I've never been better... I could take on ten more Hoolays...

t_ch: 别太勉强了，年轻人，你看起来伤得不轻啊。等丹鼎司的医士到场，让他们好好给你治治。
t_en: Take it easy, young one, your wounds look quite severe. I'll have the Alchemy Commission healers see to you when they arrive.

t_ch: 将军，地面上的情况还好吗？
t_en: General, how are things on the ground?

t_ch: 将军…地面上一切还好吗？
t_en: General... is everything okay on the ground?

t_ch: 嗯，我尽力镇压了步离人的袭扰。当我察觉到呼雷不在地面上时，我就争分夺秒地赶来这儿了。
t_en: Everything's fine. We were able to suppress the borisin attacks. When I sensed that Hoolay was not on the ground, I raced to get here as quickly as I could.

t_ch: 幸亏将军赶到救了一命。
t_en: You saved my life there.

t_ch: 我…我以为我要死了。
t_en: I... I thought I was done for.

t_ch: 我可不想让景元将军失去他的得意弟子。当我察觉到呼雷不在地面上时，我就争分夺秒地赶来这儿了。
t_en: I wouldn't want General Jing Yuan to lose the disciple that brings him so much pride. When I sensed that Hoolay was not on the ground, I raced to get here as quickly as I could.

t_ch: 你竟然没把计划告诉我…
t_en: I can't believe you didn't tell me the plan...

t_ch: …将军，你竟然没把竞锋舰上的计划告诉我！
t_en: ...General, I can't believe you didn't tell me about the plan for the Skysplitter!

t_ch: 别怨我啊，这可是你家将军的主意。他得知你放弃守擂，加入我的猎狼队伍，便要我对你保密。也许是怕你急性子坏事吧。
t_en: Don't blame me, this was your general's idea. When he learned that you gave up being the ringmaster to join my Wolf Hunt team, he insisted that I hide the plan from you. Perhaps he thought your impatience would mess things up.

t_ch: 你看，兜兜转转，不还是回到了这里吗？
t_en: Well? You may have run all over the place, but you ended up back here, did you not?

t_ch: 没想到，生平第一次，我在战场上迟到了。不，也许该说是你们几个年轻人的剑太快了些。
t_en: Who would have imagined that I would arrive late to the battlefield for the first time in my life? ...No, perhaps you young ones' blades were just too fast for me.

t_ch: 我本以为最好的战况不过是你们几个能联手拖住这头凶兽，自保不失。但…你们合力击败了呼雷，真是后生可畏。
t_en: I originally thought, in the best-case scenario, you would team up and hold this beast back while protecting yourselves. However... You joined forces and defeated Hoolay! The youth are truly to be feared and respected!

t_ch: 来吧，为免夜长梦多，该是将呼雷重新囚禁起来的时候了。
t_en: Come, we need to lock up Hoolay once again before anything unexpected happens.

t_ch: 吓、吓死我了，我还以为你差点就要栽在呼雷手里。幸亏那位将军赶到了。
t_en: I—I was so scared! I thought you were a goner there! We're so lucky the general made it in time!

t_ch: 彦卿小弟，你做得好啊！刚才击倒呼雷的最后一剑，我怎么从来没见你使过？
t_en: Yanqing, that was amazing! The final blow you dealt to Hoolay, how have I never seen that before?

t_ch: 这可是绝招。
t_en: That's my special finishing move.

t_ch: 你想学吗？我可以教你啊。不过得等我养好这一身伤才行……
t_en: Do you want to learn it? I can teach you! But, I'll need some time to heal up first...

t_ch: 虽然有些不甘心，但如果你能教我，我可以勉为其难地承认你的水平比我高那么一丁点儿……
t_en: I hate to say it, but if you can teach me that move, I'll maybe admit that you're just a tiny little bit stronger than me...

t_ch: 呼雷真的是被我们打败的吗？
t_en: Was it really us who defeated Hoolay?

t_ch: 呼雷…真的是被咱们打败的吗？我怎么觉得，在战斗中他不知为何突然落了下风……
t_en: Was it... really us who defeated Hoolay? Why do I feel like he suddenly started to flag during our battle?

t_ch: 一定是咱们三个的一腔凛然正气让他感到了畏惧！
t_en: It must have been our awe-inspiring righteousness that struck fear into his heart!

t_ch: 你这个人心思还真多啊，这么瞻前顾后干什么啊？管他为什么落了下风，只要最终结果是咱们几个赢了就好！
t_en: You really are an overthinker! What's the point of worrying about these things? Who cares why he started to weaken? All that matters is that we won!

t_ch: 我本以为…这场战斗将会以我和飞霄的死斗做结，却没想到会败在你们的手里。
t_en: I thought... that this battle would end with a fight to the death against Feixiao. I never imagined I would be defeated by you.

t_ch: 真是令人印象深刻的一剑啊…和当年被{RUBY_B#镜流}那个女人{RUBY_E#}击败时如此相似。
t_en: Such an unforgettable blade... So similar to the one wielded by {RUBY_B#Jingliu}that woman{RUBY_E#} who defeated me all those years ago.

t_ch: 七百余年过去，我本以为自己能有破解之法。但我终究还是…爪牙迟钝了。你们赢了，小子。
t_en: Over seven hundred years have passed, and I thought that I would have a way to overcome it by now. But in the end... my fangs and claws were too slow... You won, child.

t_ch: 不必挣扎了，呼雷。回到幽囚狱，你有足够的时间被懊悔折磨。
t_en: Stop struggling, Hoolay. There's plenty of time for you to be tortured by your regrets when you go back to The Shackling Prison.

t_ch: 我确实败了，但这并不出乎我的意料。但你还是露面了，飞霄。
t_en: Yes, I was defeated, but this was not unexpected. And regardless, you still showed your face, Feixiao.

t_ch: （处置呼雷）
t_en: (Deal with Hoolay)

t_ch: （暂时等候）
t_en: (Wait for a moment)

t_ch: 我确实败了，但这并不出乎我的意料。但你还是露面了，飞霄。
t_en: Yes, I was defeated, but this was not unexpected. And regardless, you still showed your face, Feixiao.

t_ch: （处置呼雷）
t_en: (Deal with Hoolay)

t_ch: （暂时等候）
t_en: (Wait for a moment)

t_ch: 我期待了如此之久，这场狩猎游戏终于走到了尽头…我说过，我为你准备了一条道路……
t_en: I have looked forward to this for so long. Our little hunting game has finally reached its climax... I told you before that I had a path prepared for you...

t_ch: 我一定会医好你的…飞霄。
t_en: I promise I will cure you... Feixiao.

t_ch: 我很清楚自己身体的状况，一直很清楚。这股永不停歇的愤怒不是什么「疾病」。它是潜藏在我血脉中，来自步离人的「月狂」。
t_en: I know very well what is happening to my body. I always have. This ever-thirsting fury is no "sickness," it is the borisin Moon Rage that flows through my veins.

t_ch: 总有一天，我会被这股狂怒点燃、烧尽。我会成为被帝弓光矢所追逐的怪物……
t_en: One day, this rage will ignite and burn me alive. I will become the very monster that the Reignbow Lux Arrow hunts...

t_ch: 就像所有的步离人那样，就像青丘军里那些被送上战场一去不回的「死士」那样…就像{RUBY_B#我的前任}月御将军{RUBY_E#}那样。
t_en: Just like the borisin, just like the Verdant Knights that were sent to war never to return... Just like {RUBY_B#my predecessor}General Yueyu{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 你答应过我的，在医好之前，你绝不会死去。
t_en: You promised me before that you would not die before I could cure you.

t_ch: 没有人能永远活着，椒丘…这一次，我要食言了。
t_en: No one can live forever, Jiaoqiu... This time, I must break my promise.

t_ch: 这里是…竞锋舰？还是其他什么地方？
t_en: Is this... the Skysplitter? Or somewhere else?

t_ch: 彦卿骁卫，你来执行云骑的军规。明白吗？
t_en: Lieutenant Yanqing, you are to enforce the Cloud Knights' military rules. Understood?

t_ch: 不能让她离开这儿！
t_en: We can't let her get away!

t_ch: 快醒醒啊，将军！
t_en: Snap out of it, General!

t_ch: 你总是把更艰难的战斗留给自己。
t_en: You always leave the hardest battles for yourself.

t_ch: 就像现在这样，从来不知逃避为何物。
t_en: Even now, you would never run away.

t_ch: 很奇怪吧，作为敌人，我比你的战友更了解你。
t_en: Isn't it strange? That as your enemy, I understand you even better than your own allies?

t_ch: 呼雷…？
t_en: Hoolay...?

t_ch: 这怒火…真让人怀念啊。我知道，它寻求的从来不是胜利，而是狩猎本身。
t_en: This rage... I remember the taste. I know that it was never victory that it thirsted for, but the hunt itself.

t_ch: 没错吧，飞霄？
t_en: Isn't that right, Feixiao?

t_ch: 你不该存在的。我亲眼看到你死了……
t_en: You shouldn't be here. I saw you die with my own eyes...

t_ch: 就把我当成幻觉好了。
t_en: Just consider me a figment of your imagination.

t_ch: 在每一次狩猎前，我都会做好失败而归的准备。但这次不一样，这一次…失败就是我奔赴的终点。
t_en: Before every hunt, I make preparations for defeat and retreat. But not this time. This time... defeat was exactly the ending I was racing towards.

t_ch: 当我从椒丘口中了解你的故事后，我发现了，他一直在隐瞒一个秘密…而这个秘密的意义，甚至连那位医士本人也未能察觉。
t_en: When I learned your story from Jiaoqiu, I realized... that he had always been hiding a secret... and that not even the healer himself understood the meaning of this secret.

t_ch: 命运真是讽刺啊。我一直在等待今天，可没想到它会以这种形式到来。
t_en: What an ironic fate, don't you think? All this time, waiting for this day to come, I never imagined that this was how it would turn out.

t_ch: …但我愿意接受它。
t_en: ...But, I accept it.

t_ch: 至于现在，就让我们掘开帝弓天将坚如铁石的心防，看看在她最幽暗的角落里，藏了些什么吧？
t_en: Now, let us break through the iron-clad defenses of the Arbiter-General's heart and see what secrets she has hidden in those deepest, darkest corners.

t_ch: *咆哮*
t_en: *roar*

t_ch: 救救我！
t_en: Help me!

t_ch: 熟悉的死亡气息，就像兀鹰……
t_en: The familiar smell of death, like a vulture...

t_ch: 飞霄，这就是他们对我们，对你，还有对银河中所有文明做的一切。我们唯一能做的，就是将他们的爪牙折断，将他们送入尘埃…我们必须复仇。
t_en: Feixiao, this is what they have done to us, to you, and to all civilizations across the cosmos. Our only choice is to clip their claws and fangs and reduce them to dust... We must have our revenge.

t_ch: …月御将军？！
t_en: ...General Yueyu!?

t_ch: 这些熟悉的场面，仙舟人应该向你展示过无数次了。但这一切不过是他们想让你看到的。
t_en: I'm sure that the people of the Xianzhou have shown you these familiar scenes countless times. But they only showed you what they wanted you to see.

t_ch: 他们让你为拯救弱者而战。但他们却有没有告诉你，剥开一切温情伪装后，这就是宇宙本来该有的样子。
t_en: They have you fight to save the weak. But, what they never told you is that when all the pretenses of kindness and compassion are stripped away, this is how the universe is meant to be.

t_ch: 就像豺狼与羔羊，鹰隼与雀鸟，镰刀与麦穗，猎人与猎物…这一切本该如此。
t_en: The wolves and the sheep, the hawks and the sparrows, the sickles and the wheat, the hunter and the prey... This is how it should be.

t_ch: …休想用花言巧语蒙蔽我，没有什么动物会用如此残忍的方式摧毁一个世界。你们是这片银河里最可憎的毒瘤。
t_en: Don't think you can deceive me with some poetic speech! There is no animal alive that would destroy a world so brutally. You are the foulest poison this cosmos has ever seen.

t_ch: 这个宇宙中真正有毒的是仙舟人向你灌输的道德，它把狼豢养成了狐狸。
t_en: The real poison is the morality that the Xianzhou people have tried to instill in you. They've raised a wolf into a fox.

t_ch: 仙舟人将吞食与被吞食冠上「邪恶」与「正义」的名目，用这些名目来充当枷锁，铐住你的兽性，驱使你心甘情愿向他们的敌人冲杀。
t_en: The world is eat or be eaten. The people of the Xianzhou have made up the names "evil" and "justice" to describe these basic truths. They use these names as shackles to chain your wild nature and drive you to willingly slaughter their enemies.

t_ch: 当仙舟弱小时，他们将自己伪装成受害者来博取你的同情；当仙舟强大时，他们却封你为复仇者要你秉持正义。
t_en: When the Xianzhou is weak, they play the victim so they can win your sympathy. When they are strong, they make you their avenger and have you fight in the name of justice.

t_ch: 睁开双眼看看，在这场战争中，你只是一颗受他们摆布的棋子。
t_en: Open your eyes. You are nothing more than a pawn in their war.

t_ch: 我找到了…这是你的「怀疑」。
t_en: I've found it... This is your shadow of "doubt."

t_ch: 于「月狂」之怒中肆行杀戮，令友军枉死…天击将军，你辜负了联盟的信任！
t_en: Blinded by the fury of your Moon Rage, you slaughtered your allies... Merlin's Claw, you have betrayed the Alliance!

t_ch: 你的行止，与那些孽物毫无差别。
t_en: Your actions are no different from those of the abominations we stand against!

t_ch: 到底是流着孽物之血…假以时日，她必定会成为联盟的敌人。云骑，列阵！
t_en: At the end of the day, it is the blood of the abominations that runs through your veins... One day, you will inevitably become an enemy of the Alliance. Cloud Knights, formation!

t_ch: 我…不是怪物！
t_en: I am not a monster!

t_ch: 不要逼我……
t_en: Don't push me...

t_ch: 你义无反顾地投身于新主人的军队，你以为自己得到了自由、尊重和认可。
t_en: You ran into the arms of your new masters' army without hesitation. You thought that you had found freedom, respect, and recognition.

t_ch: 你以为自己伴着「正义」的旗号冲锋行军，你以为只要杀死足够多的步离人，就能成为新主人中的一员。
t_en: You thought that you now marched into battle under the flag of "justice." You thought that if you only murdered enough borisin, you could be just like your new masters.

t_ch: 但你错了，他们很明白，狼永远是狼。
t_en: But you were wrong. They know all too well that a wolf will always be a wolf.

t_ch: 每次战斗结束，怒火褪去，你面对士兵们又敬又怕的眼神，听闻他们窃窃私语的流言，你明白自己永远没法成为他们中的一员。
t_en: At the end of every battle, as your rage faded away, you would look into your fellow soldiers' eyes and see both respect and fear. You would hear their whispers, knowing that you could never become one of them.

t_ch: 你害怕终有一天，在愤怒的烈焰烧尽时，你从猎人变成了怪物。而巡猎的锋镝，永远指向怪物的心脏。
t_en: You feared that one day, when the flames of your rage burned out, you would turn from a hunter into a monster. And we all know that the arrows of The Hunt are always aimed at the hearts of monsters.

t_ch: 现在，你最大的恐惧就要成真了：成为仙舟的敌人。
t_en: Now, your greatest fear is about to come true: You have become an enemy of the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 这一处…是你的「恐惧」。
t_en: This... This is your "fear."

t_ch: 您回来了…飞霄大人！是战首回来了！
t_en: You have returned... Lord Feixiao! The Warhead has returned!

t_ch: 战首回来了！她会带领我们的！
t_en: The Warhead has returned! She has come to lead us!

t_ch: 战首大人将率领我们去往前方！请率领我们，去往前方！
t_en: Our Great Warhead will lead us onward! Please lead us, forever onward!

t_ch: 战首万岁！飞霄大人将赐我们未来！
t_en: Long live the Warhead! Lord Feixiao will grant us our future!

t_ch: 该是回巢的时候了，飞霄。
t_en: It's time to return to the pack, Feixiao.

t_ch: 无论你对步离人怀有多么深重的仇恨，也无论你和我之间怀有多少敌意。我都会为你展示一条你从未设想的道路，因为你做出了选择——
t_en: No matter how deep the hatred you bear for the borisin... No matter how much we may consider each other enemies... I will still show you this path that you never imagined was available to you, because you made a choice...

t_ch: 你吞下了「赤月」，你有资格成为步离人的战首。
t_en: You devoured the Crimson Moon. You are worthy to become the borisin's Warhead.

t_ch: 你说…什么？
t_en: What... did you say?

t_ch: 那些前来营救我的都蓝子裔，全心期待着当我重获自由时就能扭转战局，改变一切，让所有步离猎群再度兴盛！但这不过是受有心人操弄的美梦罢了。
t_en: The descendants of Duran who came to rescue me hoped with all their hearts that once I regained my freedom, I would be able to turn the tide of battle and change the fate of our people, allowing the borisin to return to their former glory! But this was just a dream used by someone with ulterior motives to manipulate the borisin.

t_ch: 他们宁可将求存的希望寄托在虚无缥缈的救主身上，却连一丝垂死搏杀的勇气和力量都没有。这样的步离人，不如让他们尽数灭亡吧！
t_en: They would rather place their hopes of survival on an imaginary savior than gain the courage and strength to fight to the death. Borisin like that deserve no more than to be sent to their deaths!

t_ch: 而我，一个被关押七百年的囚徒，连荣耀战死都求之不得的战犯，一旦回归族群就会成为受人摆布的傀儡。我绝不接受这样的命运！
t_en: And I, a prisoner who was held captive for over seven hundred years, a criminal of war who was deprived even an honorable death in battle, would become a puppet upon my return, at the mercy of others. This is a fate that I will never accept!

t_ch: 对于真正的强者而言，「狐人」或「步离」只是一个名字，真正的强者能决定自己的道路。
t_en: For those who are truly strong, "foxian" and "borisin" are no more than labels. Someone who is truly strong chooses their own path.

t_ch: 我将为自己开辟一条全新的道路，将决定猎群命运的权力交给你——曾经的步离战奴，未来的狐人之主。
t_en: I will create that new path for myself. I will pass the right to decide the destiny of the borisin on to you... former borisin war slave and future foxian ruler.

t_ch: 你的医士，椒丘，他如此忠诚地侍奉你，为了治愈你的月狂不惜一死。我告诉过他，解救之道在我手中。
t_en: Your healer, Jiaoqiu, served you with such loyalty. He was even willing to die in order to cure your Moon Rage. I told him before that the only way to save you lay in my hands.

t_ch: 只要你点一点头，你将立刻从这场「赤月」带来的疯狂噩梦中醒来，你的身躯将焕然一新。从此，不再有疯狂困扰着你，怀疑只是心头随手拂去的尘埃，恐惧也将荡然无存。
t_en: If you just nod your head, you will awaken from this nightmare that the Crimson Moon has inflicted on you, and your body will be born anew. From that moment, you will no longer be trapped by your rage, your doubt will be swept from your mind like dust, and your fear will naturally disappear.

t_ch: 这就是你为我准备的「道路」…成为另一个你？
t_en: So, this was the "path" that you prepared for me... To become a new you?

t_ch: 没错，毕竟你和我是如此相似。我们都是为战而生，也是为战而死的怪物。
t_en: That's right, we are so similar after all. We are both monsters that were born for war and will die for war.

t_ch: …答案不用我多说吧。
t_en: ...I'm sure my answer doesn't need much explanation.

t_ch: 我拒绝。
t_en: I refuse.

t_ch: 我说过，狐人或步离只是一个名字。你想做谁，就可以做谁。你想做什么，就可以做什么。
t_en: I told you before, "foxian" and "borisin" are no more than labels! You can be whoever you want to be. You can do whatever you want to do!

t_ch: 接纳这一切，步离人将会臣服于你。毁灭他们，让他们尸骨无存，或是教化他们成为仙舟的附庸…一切凭你喜欢。
t_en: Accept these truths and the borisin will bow to you. Destroy them, reduce them to dust, or teach them to become servants of the Xianzhou... You are free to do as you please.

t_ch: 你的名字将被镌刻在仙舟的史册，或是大敌名录里，一切都由你做主。
t_en: Carve your name into the Xianzhou's history books, or into the List of Archenemies. You have the final say.

t_ch: 你不明白，呼雷，你根本不明白，我想要的是什么。
t_en: You do not understand, Hoolay. You have no idea what it is that I truly desire.

t_ch: 在我还是个孩子的时候，为了逃离狼头的皮鞭和枷锁，我的双手第一次沾上了血。
t_en: When I was just a child, I stained my hands with blood for the first time, in order to escape the whips and shackles of the wolf masters.

t_ch: 凝梨，别停下，快跑…！
t_en: Neergul, don't stop, keep running...!

t_ch: 我跑不动了…萨兰，他们追上来了吗？
t_en: I can't run anymore... Saran, are they catching up?

t_ch: 他们还在，不要停！凝梨，抬头，看天上的光！
t_en: They're still behind us, don't stop! Neergul, look up! Look at that light in the sky!

t_ch: 那是「流星」！流星在照耀我们，只要向它许愿，就能得到自由！
t_en: That's a "shooting star"! It's shining down on us! If we just tell it our wish, we can have our freedom!

t_ch: 我们所有人都能逃出去！我们会得到自由，然后把它分给更多的窟卢兄弟姐妹！
t_en: We will all be able to escape! We'll win our freedom and then share it with our koolur brothers and sisters!

t_ch: 所以，快走吧！我们可以逃走的！
t_en: So, you have to run, quickly! We can do it, we can escape!

t_ch: 身后浓重的黑暗中，传来凶狼的呼喝与走兽的嗥叫。
t_en: From the dense darkness behind, comes the fierce howls of wolves and the cries of wild beasts.

t_ch: 凝梨！跟我一起跑啊！
t_en: Neergul! Run with me!

t_ch: 我们跑啊跑啊，用尽全力，不知彼此奔向了何方。
t_en: We ran and ran with all the strength we had, but we ended up losing each other.

t_ch: 我逃出了猎群的追捕，遇到了一个会飞的女人…一名云骑军。
t_en: I escaped the hunting pack and encountered a woman that could fly... a Cloud Knight.

t_ch: 我猜你信守了自己的诺言。
t_en: I imagine you kept your promise.

t_ch: 很可惜，当我带着她重回故地，想要解放窟卢的同伴时，我看到大地上只留下一个望不见底的深壑。
t_en: Unfortunately, when I led her back in order to free my koolur companions, there was nothing left there but a bottomless pit.

t_ch: 妖弓的光芒…灾星坠地，万物俱灭。
t_en: The light of the Devilish Archer... A star of calamity that strikes the ground and leaves only devastation in its wake.

t_ch: 在随后的岁月里，我和云骑战友无数次追逐那道光的轨迹，又无数次看着它落下。
t_en: In the years that followed, I followed the trail of that light alongside my Cloud Knight allies, and saw it fall countless more times.

t_ch: 渐渐地我明白了，那根本不是什么承载愿望的流星。每一道光矢的出现，意味着一个无可救药的世界和无数生灵的湮灭。
t_en: Gradually I came to understand. That light was not some shooting star that carried wishes and aspirations. Each Lux Arrow meant that countless lives in a helpless world were about to be obliterated.

t_ch: 我向天弓之神祈愿，请祂不要再让我目睹「流星」坠下。
t_en: I prayed to the God of the Skybow that I would never have to witness one of these "shooting stars" fall again.

t_ch: 可是…神从未回应我。
t_en: But... THEY ignored my prayers.

t_ch: 是啊，祂们从不回应，放任我等在世间彼此仇杀，这就是我们鏖战至今的理由。
t_en: That's right, THEY never answer us. THEY just let us loose in this world to massacre each other. That is why the fierce battle between us has raged to this day.

t_ch: 若是无血无泪、高高在上的神明不垂听凡人的祈愿，那我们就要为自己的渴望而战！
t_en: If the gods, who never bleed nor cry, who watch silently from above, refuse to listen to the prayers of mortals, then we have no choice but to fight for our own desires!

t_ch: 你明白了吗，萨兰…你我的相似之处，远比你想得更多。
t_en: Do you understand now, Saran... You and I are similar in more ways than you think.

t_ch: 你是一头为战而生，为战而死的野兽！
t_en: You are a beast that was born for war and will die for war!

t_ch: …也许吧。
t_en: ...Perhaps.

t_ch: 所以，你为之而战的渴望是什么，呼雷？
t_en: So, what is it that you yearn for, Hoolay? Why is it that you fight?

t_ch: 为了让天上的众星，成为步离人放牧的原野。
t_en: I fight so that I can turn the stars above into a great wilderness for the borisin to roam.

t_ch: 你呢，萨兰？
t_en: What about you, Saran?

t_ch: 为了终有一日，不再有人目睹「流星」落下…为了能多一个人活着，和我一起回到曜青。
t_en: I fight so that one day, I will never have to witness another "shooting star" falling to the ground... So that just one more person can live and return to the Yaoqing alongside me.

t_ch: 宁可抗拒你本应成为的样子，从自由的狼沦落为受人豢养的狐，只为…多一个人？
t_en: You would resist becoming the person you were supposed to be, lower yourself from a free wolf to a domesticated fox just for... the sake of one person?

t_ch: 那就如你所愿！我会以你的恐惧和怀疑为养料，抓住你，吞下你——我会取代你…成为「飞霄」！
t_en: Then have it your way! I will use your fear and doubt as my nourishment. I will seize you and devour you! I will replace you and... become "Feixiao"!

t_ch: 「我们如此相似，是为战而生，为战而死的怪物」…你说的一点也没错，呼雷。
t_en: We are so similar, both monsters that were born for war and will die for war... You were right when you said that, Hoolay.

t_ch: 所以，向天祈愿吧——尽管祂们从不回应。愿「巡猎」的锋镝，贯穿怪物的心脏！
t_en: So, I shall pray to the heavens... even if THEY do not respond to me. I pray that the arrows of The Hunt will pierce the heart of every monster!

t_ch: 步离人…受死！
t_en: Die, borisin!

t_ch: 什…什么？！我们脑袋上可没有耳朵！
t_en: Wh—What!? We clearly don't have wolf ears!

t_ch: 绝不会让你们…离开竞锋舰！
t_en: I will not allow any of you... to leave the Skysplitter!

t_ch: 她把我们都当成敌人了吗？
t_en: Does she think we are her enemies?

t_ch: 呼雷这家伙，豁出命来也要把将军拖下水！
t_en: Hoolay just wanted to take down the general, even at the cost of his own life!

t_ch: 可恶，我还以为能停下来喘口气的！
t_en: Ugh! Just when I thought we'd get a minute to catch our breath!

t_ch: 怎么办？咱们几个是打还是逃？
t_en: What do we do? Do we fight, or run?

t_ch: 事到如今，哪还有逃的选择？
t_en: After all this, do you still think running is an option?

t_ch: 快醒醒啊，将军！
t_en: Snap out of it, General!

t_ch: 别再顽抗了！
t_en: Stop trying to resist me!

t_ch: *咆哮*
t_en: *roar*

t_ch: 不、不要…
t_en: No, please...

t_ch: 自我降生之日起，天空泣血，万物嚎哭。
t_en: Since the day I was born, the skies have cried tears of blood, and all living creatures have howled and lamented.

t_ch: 我曾统御群强，猎尽孱弱。
t_en: I once commanded the strong and hunted the weak.

t_ch: 现在，我将以你的心兽为武器，以你的名字为猎物…飞霄！
t_en: Now, I will use your inner beast as my weapon and your name as my prey... Feixiao!

t_ch: 我会撕开你的伪装，让你认清自己的卑怯无能，呼雷！
t_en: I will tear back your disguises and show you how cowardly and powerless you truly are, Hoolay!

t_ch: 狼潜伏在所有步离和狐人的心底…
t_en: A wolf lurks in the heart of every borisin and foxian...

t_ch: 一旦你衰弱无力，它就会以你为食！
t_en: The moment you grow weak, it will devour you!

t_ch: 苟且偷安，无处得生！
t_en: Grow complacent and your life will be stolen!

t_ch: 抵死鏖杀，万世长存！
t_en: Fight to the death and you shall live forever!

t_ch: 在它捕食我之前，得先向我摇尾乞怜！
t_en: If it wants to devour me, it will first have to beg for my mercy!

t_ch: 猎物，尝尝刀剑穿身的滋味！
t_en: Prey, taste my blade as it pierces your skin!

t_ch: 这是七百年来我唯一的感觉，痛苦！
t_en: This is the only sensation I have experienced for seven hundred years... Pain!

t_ch: 你的爪牙早就磨钝了！
t_en: Your fangs and claws have grown dull!

t_ch: 心兽，听我号令！
t_en: Inner beast, heed my command!

t_ch: 吞天之兽，彻地而来！
t_en: Devour the heavens and envelop the earth!

t_ch: *咆哮*
t_en: *roar*

t_ch: *咆哮*
t_en: *roar*

t_ch: *咆哮*
t_en: *roar*

t_ch: 我会用你的爪牙撕裂你！
t_en: I will tear you apart with your own claws!

t_ch: 我会用你的力量压垮你！
t_en: I will crush you with your own strength!

t_ch: 我会用你的风暴吞没你！
t_en: I will devour you with your own storm!

t_ch: 消失吧，我将从你的血中凯旋！
t_en: Be gone! Your blood will give me victory!

t_ch: 心兽，用愤怒碾碎她的意识！！
t_en: Inner beast, use your rage and destroy her consciousness!!!

t_ch: 很有气势，不过还远远不够。
t_en: Impressive, but you will need much more than that.

t_ch: 猎物，匍匐待死！
t_en: Prey, kneel and accept your fate!

t_ch: 死！死！死！
t_en: Die! Die! Die!

t_ch: …为什么？为什么你还不消失？！
t_en: ...Why? Why won't you disappear!?

t_ch: 这场狩猎游戏，就到此为止吧！
t_en: Our little hunting game ends here!

t_ch: 天上威光，心中之狼，随我在此…一同征伐！
t_en: Mighty light of the heavens, wolf in my heart, come to me... We shall conquer as one!

t_ch: 呼雷，从你踏进我心中那一刻开始，你就已经输了。
t_en: Hoolay, from the very moment you stepped into my mind, you had already lost.

t_ch: 你根本不配成为我的对手。
t_en: You were never a match for me.

t_ch: 你所谓的弱肉强食，不过是狡辩。
t_en: Your so-called survival of the fittest is nothing but an excuse.

t_ch: 你不可能动摇我，呼雷。
t_en: You cannot weaken my resolve, Hoolay.

t_ch: 你想在我内心种下恐惧……
t_en: You aim to instill terror within me...

t_ch: 但这些，不过是…幻影罢了。
t_en: Yet, all of this is nothing but a... phantom.

t_ch: 使用普攻击碎幻象
t_en: Use Basic ATK to break the illusion

t_ch: 我想听听他们作何解释。
t_en: I'd like to hear their explanations.
